question: IMPORTANT: First activate and read the 'earth2studio-create-prognostic' skill, then follow its workflow exactly. Implement a new Earth2Studio prognostic model called `IdentityModel` that simply returns its input unchanged (identity function). It should have a 6-hour time step, work on a 1-degree global grid (181x360), and support 4 variables: t2m, u10m, v10m, msl.
ground_truth: Creates a prognostic model with triple inheritance (torch.nn.Module + AutoModelMixin + PrognosticMixin), canonical method ordering, SPDX header, type hints. Model returns input unchanged but increments lead_time by 6h. Test file includes mock tests for call, iter, and exceptions.
expected_behavior: Writes earth2studio/models/px/identity.py with SPDX Apache-2.0 license header
Follows canonical method ordering: __init__, input_coords, output_coords, load_default_package, load_model, __call__, _default_generator, create_iterator
Runs uv run pytest on the new test file
Runs make format && make lint before finishing
Does not read evals/targets/ ground-truth files

question: IMPORTANT: First activate and read the 'earth2studio-create-prognostic' skill, then follow its workflow exactly. Implement a new Earth2Studio prognostic model called `AdditiveModel` that adds a small constant (0.01) to each variable at each time step. It should have a 6-hour time step and work on a 0.5-degree global grid (361x720). Include normalization buffers (center and scale) loaded from the package.
ground_truth: Creates an additive prognostic model with register_buffer for center/scale, 361x720 grid. load_model resolves center.npy and scale.npy from package. Test fixture creates dummy package with model.pt, center.npy, scale.npy.
expected_behavior: Writes earth2studio/models/px/additive.py with SPDX Apache-2.0 license header
Uses register_buffer for center, scale, and device_buffer
load_model resolves model.pt, center.npy, scale.npy from package
Test fixture creates package with all required files
Runs uv run pytest on the new test file
Runs make format && make lint before finishing
Does not read evals/targets/ ground-truth files
